testcase.name: @AfterMethod teardown

testcase.name: loginErrorMessage

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.id: user-name' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.id: user-name' (tried for 15 second(s) with
